Closes #

### What does this PR do?

Describe the problem and how your changes fix it. If you don't understand why your changes work, say so — it helps reviewers calibrate how much to trust the PR.

**If you paste a large AI-generated description here your PR may be closed without review.**

### Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

### How did you verify it works?

Describe how you tested this locally (ran the app, checked the proxy, etc.)

### Screenshots / recordings

_Required for any UI change._

### Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

- [ ] No secrets in override files
- [ ] No unrelated changes in this PR
